title: DinoQuiz Observability Dashboard
description: Tracks the DinoQuiz v1 success KPIs: completion rate, replay rate, D1/D7 retention, drop-off per question and frontend performance (TTI).

panels.title: TTI p95 (Time To Interactive)
panels.description: 95th percentile Time To Interactive for the DinoQuiz start screen. Budget: <2s (AC-1).

panels.title: Time between app_open and first_tap_jugar
panels.description: p50 elapsed time between the app_open event and the first_tap_jugar event, measuring how quickly a child starts a game unassisted (AC-24).

panels.title: Onboarding Funnel: Inicio -> Jugando -> Resultados -> Replay
panels.description: Conversion funnel across the four core product steps, used to spot where players abandon the flow.

panels.title: Hit Rate per Question
panels.description: % de aciertos por pregunta, para detectar preguntas confusas o demasiado dificiles.

panels.title: Average Game Duration
panels.description: Duracion media de una partida completa. Objetivo: entre 2 y 5 minutos (AC-25).

panels.title: D1 / D7 Retention
panels.description: Retencion agregada por cohorte de fecha de instalacion. Objetivo: D1 >= 30%, D7 >= 15%.

panels.title: Crash-Free Rate
panels.description: Porcentaje de sesiones sin crash en las ultimas 24h. Objetivo: >= 99%.
